hero.badge: Available for Windows — Mac and Linux coming soon
hero.headline: The Roblox account manager
hero.subheadline: Local AES-256-GCM encryption, Multi-Roblox, REST API. Without compromising your cookies.

features.title: Everything you need to manage your accounts
features.subtitle: Leave obsolete tools behind. NexoAccManager combines security, performance, and modern design in a single platform.
features.item1Desc: Your Roblox cookies never leave your PC. Hardware-derived local encryption.
features.item2Desc: Launch multiple Roblox instances simultaneously without conflicts.
features.item3Desc: Local Fastify backend to manage accounts and launches. Port 8080.
features.item4Desc: Migrate your accounts easily between devices with secure JSON files.
features.item5Desc: Automatically renews your .ROBLOSECURITY cookie before it expires.
features.item6Desc: Find and join Roblox servers directly from the app.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.a1: Yes, we offer a free plan with 5 Roblox accounts and basic features. To access more features, you can upgrade to one of our paid plans.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Your .ROBLOSECURITY cookies never leave your PC. We use hardware-derived AES-256-GCM local encryption to store them securely.
faq.q3: Can I use NexoAccManager on Mac or Linux?
faq.a3: Currently NexoAccManager is available for Windows. macOS and Linux versions are on our roadmap and will be released soon.
faq.a4: The Server Browser lets you search and join Roblox servers directly from the application, with filters by region, ping, and game type.
faq.q5: How does Auto Cookie Refresh work?
faq.a5: It automatically renews your .ROBLOSECURITY cookie before it expires, keeping you connected without interruptions or manual login.
faq.a6: Yes, all our plans include support. The free plan has Discord support, while paid plans include email and priority support depending on the tier.

footer.description: The Roblox account manager that the pros use

pricing.title: Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No surprises, no commitment.

billing.title: Billing
billing.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will lose access to your plan features.

download.title: Download
download.subtitle: Download and install NexoAccManager on your device

reqsList.mac: macOS 11 Big Sur or higher · 4GB RAM · 500MB space
reqsList.linux: Ubuntu 20.04 / Debian 11 or higher · 4GB RAM · 500MB space

stepsWindows.1: Download the .exe installer from GitHub Releases
stepsWindows.2: Run the installer and follow the setup wizard
stepsWindows.3: Launch NexoAccManager from the Start Menu
stepsWindows.4: Sign in with your NexoAccManager account

stepsMac.1: Download the .dmg file from GitHub Releases
stepsMac.2: Open the .dmg and drag NexoAccManager to Applications
stepsMac.3: Launch NexoAccManager from Launchpad (allow if prompted)
stepsMac.4: Sign in with your NexoAccManager account

stepsLinux.1: Download the .AppImage file from GitHub Releases
stepsLinux.4: Sign in with your NexoAccManager account
